projectDescription: A dark-themed movie and TV series browsing web app powered by The Movie Database (TMDB) API, featuring real-time search, genre filtering, and responsive card-based content display.
keyFeatures: Browse popular movies powered by the TMDB API
Browse popular TV series with dedicated series page
Real-time search bar for movies and series
Genre dropdown menu with 16 genre categories
Responsive card grid layout (desktop, tablet, mobile)
Dynamic card rendering with poster images, title, and release year
Dark UI theme with blueviolet accent styling
Single shared JavaScript module handles both movies and series pages
publicApiSurface: obtenerContenido(query?) — fetches popular content or search results from TMDB
mostrarCards(items) — renders an array of movie/series objects as HTML cards
TMDB GET /tv/popular — fetches popular TV series
TMDB GET /search/movie?query= — searches movies by title
TMDB GET /search/tv?query= — searches TV series by title
js/main.js — shared JS module for data fetching and rendering
